calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Continued To Dec-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ACTUATE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Patrick Wong and Alan Ouellette of Foley & Lardner LLP (434.4484) for plaintiff and moving party; Mehrnaz Boroumand Smith and Robert D. Tadlock of Kilpatrick Townsend (273.7559) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: the court treats the demurrer as seeking to abate the action. The demurrer is sustained and the court abates this action until the conclusion of the federal action. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Continued To Jan-24-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
